title: Purpose with to and so that
subtitle: Say why you do something.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I study every day to improve my English.
我每天学习，为了提高英语。
I wrote it down so that I could remember it.
我把它写下来，这样我就能记住。
Why do you write new words down?
你为什么把新词写下来？
I write them down so that I can remember them.
我把它们写下来，这样我能记住。

items.en: I study every day to improve my English.
items.zh: 我每天学习，为了提高英语。

items.en: I wrote it down so that I could remember it.
items.zh: 我把它写下来，这样我就能记住。

items.en: Why do you write new words down?
items.zh: 你为什么把新词写下来？

items.en: I write them down so that I can remember them.
items.zh: 我把它们写下来，这样我能记住。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Why do you write new words down?
lines.zh: 你为什么把新词写下来？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I write them down so that I can remember them.
lines.zh: 我把它们写下来，这样我能记住。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I wrote it down so that I could remember it.
lines.zh: 我把它写下来，这样我就能记住。

items.en: I study every day to improve my English.
items.zh: 我每天学习，为了提高英语。

items.en: I wrote it down so that I could remember it.
items.zh: 我把它写下来，这样我就能记住。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
